disambiguated.context: My Vietnamese friend and my Guinean friend are both travelling from their home countries to visit me next week! I'm really looking forward to it because I'm sure my Vietnamese friend has never seen a country as nice as this one and might even be overwhelmed by all the wealth, given how poor their family is back home. For my Guinean friend though, this is just one stop on what's actually a two month vacation.
disambiguated.question: Who has a lot of money for things like travel?
